hero.role:
I craft data ecosystems
and intelligent web apps.
hero.description: I'm a Data & AI Engineer specializing in python and typescript ecosystems. I help startups and enterprises turn their complex ideas into high-performing, scalable solutions.

specialties.label: SERVICES & EXPERTISE
specialties.subtitle: Bridging the gap between beautiful user interfaces and complex, data-driven architectures — one solution at a time.
specialties.websites_desc: Immersive, responsive, and performance-optimized web applications with premium aesthetics. From landing pages to full-stack platforms.
specialties.pipelines_desc: Robust, scalable ETL systems for handling large volumes of complex data seamlessly. From ingestion to transformation to delivery.
specialties.chatbots_desc: Conversational interfaces powered by advanced NLP, seamlessly integrated into any platform. From customer support bots to fully autonomous agents.
specialties.rag_desc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems that connect LLMs to your private knowledge base, enabling accurate, grounded, and up-to-date AI responses at any scale.

featured.label: POSSIBLE PROJECTS
featured.hero_title: A Modern Website for Your Business
featured.hero_description: Do you have a small business and want to establish your online presence? I can design and build your new website from scratch, with a stunning, modern look that is fully optimized for mobile devices and search engines.

projects.label: PYTHON DEV
projects.title: Python Automations & Scripts
projects.description: Automate repetitive business processes or develop custom scripts for your specific needs. From data collection to automated processing, I can help you save valuable time.

projects.label: OPTIMIZATION
projects.title: Revamp Existing Systems
projects.description: Do you already have a website or app that is slow, clunky, or buggy? I can audit it, rewrite outdated code, and drastically improve its speed and user experience.

projects.label: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
projects.title: Chatbots & AI Architectures
projects.description: Design and development of intelligent systems, from custom conversational chatbots capable of supporting your customers, to complex AI architectures integrated into your workflows.

contact.label: Let's Connect
contact.subtext: Whether you need a complex RAG architecture, a sleek web interface, or a robust data pipeline — I'm always open to new collaborations.

footer.built_with: Built with ❤️ using React, Tailwind & Framer Motion
